queries.q: Write the async update for teams who weren't in today's planning meeting about what we decided
Translate this recap into a Slack message for engineering explaining what it means for them
Leadership needs to know the outcome of yesterday's roadmap review even though they weren't there
Draft the exec-memo version of this decision for people who missed the meeting
We committed to something in today's sync that support needs to know about; write that update
Send a Notion update to the broader team on what was decided in the migration planning call
This decision needs to propagate to three downstream teams who weren't in the room; write the update
Turn this meeting recap into an email for stakeholders who need the what-it-means version
I need something to forward to people who stepped out of the call early
Write the follow-up update continuing the thread from last week's stakeholder note on this same project
Take this PRD and give me tailored versions for engineering, design, and our exec sponsor
queries.notes: Multi-audience fan-out from a source artifact, not a single meeting-outcome update

queries.q: I need five different audience cuts of this launch plan, not just one outcomes update
Just write up today's meeting for the people who were actually in the room
queries.notes: Summarizing for attendees, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Recap this morning's standup with decisions and owners for the attendees
Map out who the stakeholders are on this migration and how influential each one is
queries.notes: Understanding stakeholders, not communicating to them, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Why does my Docker build cache invalidate on every run?
Write a Python script to dedupe a CSV by email column
Suggest an easy weeknight dinner recipe for four people
